turns.content: Show me the last 5 commits on strata-worker.

Here's `git log --oneline -5` from strata-worker:

```
b1c4d2f docs: clarify R2 artifact path convention in RELEASES.md
3e8a7b1 chore(deps): bump @cloudflare/workers-types to 4.2026.05.01
9af7c2a fix(sync): debounce KV writes to avoid eventual consistency
5d2f1c8 feat(license): cache Polar validation results for 5 minutes
7e0b3a4 test: add miniflare-based KV namespace fixtures
```
